subject: Meeting
body:
Dear Ehud
I understand you are in st p I would like to meet you tomorrow I am departing tomorrow at 7:30 pm
We can meet for breakfast if that is suitable for you  I have a meeting at my hotel at 9:30 am so any time before that is good for me 
Yours
Sultan bin Sulayem 

Sent from my iPad
body_html:

subject: Meeting
body:
Hi Jeffrey,
Thank you for the coffee yesterday.? I will show you in Paris some images of the fresco.J.P.

Hi Jeffrey,
Thank you for the coffee yesterday.  I will show you in Paris some images of the fresco.J.P.
